CustomField.description: Enter the resale fee percent for this municipality. This value must match the vale in the "Resale Fee Description" field on the Municipality. Format: Enter "2.75%" as "2.75".
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the resale fee percent for this municipality. This value must match the vale in the "Resale Fee Description" field on the Municipality. Format: Enter "2.75%" as "2.75".
CustomField.label: Resale Fee Percent
